patch.value: SDK profile parity: assertRegisteredProfile + composeExtension blueprint.profiles + deriveExtensionCapabilities + describe

testing.ts: assertRegisteredProfile + RegisteredProfileExpectation/Assertion + harness binding. compose.ts: ExtensionBlueprint.profiles auto-wires registerProfile; deriveExtensionCapabilities maps profiles->schema; mergeBlueprints assign('profiles'); describeExtensionBlueprint includes profiles. activation-summary.ts + activation-summary-markdown.ts include profiles. sdk/index.ts re-exports assertRegisteredProfile, RegisteredProfileExpectation, RegisteredExtensionProjectProfile.
